messages.content:
请你翻译为英文：
  
我现在是上海交通大学的一名博士生，有SJTU提供的博士奖学金。此外，我在Shanghai AI Lab实习，有一份实习工资

I am currently a PhD student at Shanghai Jiao Tong University and receive a PhD scholarship provided by SJTU. In addition, I am doing an internship at Shanghai AI Lab and receive an internship stipend.

Based on my research direction and past experience, I have decided to focus on the research of high-resolution image generation and have summarized my research plan during the joint PhD programme at NTU.
  
改一改，改成：基于我的研究兴趣以及通过和NTU advisor的讨论，我决定将研究聚焦到2D AIGC中的一块关键领域，及high-resolution image generation and have summarized my research plan during the joint PhD programme at NTU.

Based on my research interests and discussions with my NTU advisor, I have decided to focus my research on a key area within 2D AIGC—high-resolution image generation—and have summarized my research plan for the joint PhD programme at NTU.

Based on my research interests and discussions with Prof. Xingang Pan, my NTU advisor, I have decided to focus my research on a key area within 2D AIGC: high-resolution image generation.
  
加一句：在NTU的博士过程中的研究领域是这个

Based on my research interests and discussions with Prof. Xingang Pan, my NTU advisor, I have decided to focus my research on a key area within 2D AIGC: high-resolution image generation. This will be my primary research area during my PhD at NTU.
